message:
🐛 Fix settings scroll, .join crash, and auto-update 404 spam (#1266)

- Fix GitHubActivity useMemo dependency array (was calling .join in deps)
- Fix CRDDrillDown .join on potentially undefined versions array
- Fix useVersionCheck: only call /auto-update/status when agent supports it
- Fix useVersionCheck: fallback to backend /health for install_method
- Settings page: use IntersectionObserver for active section tracking
- Settings page: scroll with offset to account for sticky navbar
- Add Developer channel toggle to user profile dropdown

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
